title: hydrangea davidii var. arbostiana
intro: Hydrangea davidii var. arbostiana, also known as the Cardiocrani, is a type of flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of China. This plant is primarily used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to the presence of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins. The health benefits of Hydrangea davidii var. arbostiana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, decoctions, and infusions, and its extracts are also used in pharmaceutical applications.
